title: オークスの後に・受け継がれし冠

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd goes wild as Air Groove conquers the
Japanese Oaks and carries on her mother's
legacy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A new queen has been crowned, and Air Groove
stands proud before her cheering fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober, who had been struggling with her
self-esteem, watches Air Groove run and realizes
she wants to be just like her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Shuka Sho, and the newly crowned
queen has no intentions of slowing down.
